info.title: Consent & Preferences - Policy & Notice Management
info.description: The Policy & Notice Management APIs are used to list privacy notices, page through results, view version history for a notice, and retrieve the version that was effective at a specific date and time.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Privacy Notice V2
tags.description: APIs used to list privacy notices, fetch versions for a notice, and get the notice version active on a given date/time.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve a list of all privacy notices. The response will include details for each privacy notice along with the corresponding privacy notice ID, created date, and last published date.

schema.description: Results page to be retrieved (0..N). Example- '?page=1
Number of records per page (1..50). Example- '?size=30

429.description:
Too Many Requests 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies.
The number of requests made within the specified period.

get.description: Use this API to retrieve a specific version of the privacy notice by the published date and time. The response will return details on the version of the privacy notice that was most recently published before the value specified in the `date` parameter.

schema.description: UUID of the Privacy Notice. The value can be obtained using [Get List of Privacy Notices](/onetrust/reference/getprivacynoticesusingget) API.
Date and time to fetch the version. Accepted formats: yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.

429.description:
Too Many Requests 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies.
The number of requests made within the specified period.

get.summary: Get List of Privacy Notice Versions
get.description: Use this API to retrieve a list of versions for a specific privacy notice.

schema.description: ID of the privacy notice. The value can be obtained using [Get List of Privacy Notices](/onetrust/reference/getprivacynoticesusingget) API.
Results page to be retrieved (0..N). Example- '?page=1
Number of records per page (1..50). Example- '?size=30

429.description:
Too Many Requests 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.

The number of requests made within the specified period.
